Gold Footer

Explore Our Gold Collection

Gold has captivated hearts for centuries, and its enduring allure continues today. At Tanishq, we celebrate this timeless tradition with a meticulously crafted collection of gold jewellery, offering a piece for every occasion and personal style.

Timeless Gold jewellery for Every Occasion

Choose from our diverse range of gold jewellery, where each piece is designed to add a touch of elegance and sophistication to your look:

  • Gold Rings: From classic bands and intricate engagement rings to statement cocktail rings, find the perfect symbol of love, commitment, or personal style in our gold ring design collection
  • Gold Earrings: Discover a world of possibilities with our stunning collection of gold earrings. Choose from delicate studs to elaborate bridal gold earrings design, and find the perfect pair to complement your face shape and personal taste.
  • Gold Necklaces: Elevate your look with a beautiful gold necklace. We offer a variety of styles, from delicate chains to statement women gold necklace design, and a range of lengths to suit your preference.
  • Gold Pendants: Express your individuality with a captivating gold pendant. Explore classic motifs, modern designs, personalized pieces, or gemstone-encrusted pendants for a touch of sparkle.
  • Gold Chains: Add a touch of timeless elegance with a gold chain. Choose from classic styles, bold statement pieces, or delicate gold chains for everyday wear.
  • Gold Bangles: Embrace tradition and heritage with our exquisite collection of gold bangles. Explore a variety of gold bangles latest design, from sleek and modern to intricately crafted bangles inspired by regional motifs
  • Gold Coins: Invest in the timeless value of gold with our collection of gold coins. These beautiful and auspicious pieces are perfect for gifting or adding to your personal collection.

Gold Jewellery for Women

Gold jewellery for women flows gracefully with everyday outfits or festive silks. Tanishq designs delicate necklaces that catch the light just right during family gatherings. Our earrings featuring soft curves and elegant geometrical designs wonderfully frame smiles at weddings or festive days. These gold ornaments for ladies carry quiet stories of heritage and joy while flaunting an undeniable shine.

Gold Jewellery for Men

Gold jewellery for men holds strength in simple lines. Thick charming chains rest comfortably against kurtas for celebrations, while our classy rings with clean edges suit office shirts or casual wear seamlessly. Tanishq pieces blend the style of modern life with timeless roots to give impeccable style for every wearer.

Types of Gold Jewellery

  • 24 carat gold jewellery glows with pure warmth, perfect for coins kept in family vaults.
  • 22 carat gold jewellery offers dazzling shine for chains or bangles. Tanishq balances masterful craft and lasting grace in every single design.

Different Metal Colours are Available

  • Gold JewelleryA classic beauty that elegantly wraps moments in that timeless yellow glow.
  • White Gold JewelleryGorgeous options that lend a crisp modern elegance to sleek styles.
  • Rose Gold JewelleryA captivating and sophisticated hue that whispers romance through soft pink tones.

Gold Jewellery For Akshaya Tritiya: A Timeless Investment

Akshaya Tritiya Jewellery honours the day with gold pieces that are exquisitely designed and full of auspicious promise. Akshaya tritiya gold jewellery like layered sets or single pendants graces puja tables beautifully.

Perfect Gifts for Loved Ones

Gold jewellery makes a thoughtful and lasting gift for any occasion. Celebrate birthdays, anniversaries, graduations, or simply show your love and appreciation with a piece from our collection.

Explore Nav-raani Collections

For an air of royalty, delve into the exquisite Nav-raani collection, featuring handcrafted pieces are a celebration of rich Indian heritage. Each piece is a masterful homage to Indian artistry, allowing you to embrace your inner royalty or gift a piece steeped in history and cultural significance.

Reimagine Your Old Gold with Tanishq's Exchange Program

Tanishq's Exchange Program enables customers to trade in their old gold from any jeweller for newer designs, at the same time ensuring they receive the best possible value for their gold.
